'''''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']], covering the Xbox, Gamecube, and Playstation 2 consoles. It includes a poster of a [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank]].

==Contents==
The Strategy Guide contains:

*Vital strategies and walkthroughs for all single and multiplayer maps

*Comprehensive details on how to master every multiplayer game type

*Extensive details on all characters, enemies, and craft, including weapons and takedown tactics

*Detailed maps for all levels, complete with waypoints, items, and enemy locations

*Comprehensive strategies for piloting all vehicles

*Giant technical poster of a Republic fighter tank

*A team interview
